_note: Recorded Azure AI Foundry Model Router usage (ILLUSTRATIVE snapshot, offline). Each entry is one task's real-shaped result: the underlying model the router picked plus the token 'usage' it billed (input/cached/output/reasoning). measured_router_summary prices this ACTUAL usage rather than the synthetic task.tokens the offline arms use, so it exercises the measured spend path. labels.provenance = recorded and labels.measured = false: replaying this snapshot is a CAPTURED measurement, not a fresh live call. Only `cost-router foundry live` with credentials yields provenance=live / measured=true. Token counts here are illustrative, not billed against any tenant. See docs/manual/foundry-live.md.
